title: FY 2021-2022 - 3rd Quarter
first_page_excerpt:
ITEM NO. 24
C1170}7OCEANSIDE
STAFFREPORT
DATE:
June 8. 2022
TO:
Honorable Mayor and City Councilmembers
FROM:
Financial Services Department
SUBJECT:
FY 2021 -22 THIRD QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT
SYNOPSIS
Staff submits the third quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City
Council accept the report and approve the budget adjustments.
BACKGROUND
The City Council adopted the FY 2021-22 budgets on June 2, 2021, with approved
General Fund revenues of $171.17 million and expenditures of $170.14 million. The City
adopted budget for all funds is $547.9 million in revenues and $546.79 million in
expenditures.
The report (Attachment 1) summarizes the preliminary General Fund major operating
funds results as of March
31, 2022,
and
is not intended to be inclusive of all
transaction
